headline: Paycom Expands $200 Million Buyback As Growth And Valuation Come Into Focus
summary: Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) has authorized a $200 million expansion to its stock buyback plan. The decision adds to prior repurchase activity and reflects the Board's current capital return priorities. The move comes as the company continues its shift toward international growth and greater automation in its offerings. Paycom Software, a provider of cloud based human capital management solutions, sits at the intersection of payroll, HR technology and automation. For you as an investor, the...

headline: Why Paycom (PAYC) Is Up 9.7% After Boosting Buybacks and Issuing Cautious 2025 Outlook
summary: In recent days, Paycom Software, Inc. expanded its stock repurchase plan by an additional US$200 million, on top of roughly US$1.45 billion already bought back since July 2024, while also reporting Q4 results that met or slightly exceeded analyst expectations but came with more cautious full-year guidance versus peers. This combination of a larger buyback authorization and slower expected growth highlights management’s preference for returning capital to shareholders while contending with...

headline: A Look At Paycom Software (PAYC) Valuation As New US$200 Million Buyback Follows Cautious Guidance
summary: Buyback decision and recent results Paycom Software (PAYC) recently approved an additional US$200 million share repurchase authorization after buying back about US$1.45b of stock since July 2024, at a time when its revenue growth and full year guidance sit at the weaker end of the HR software peer group. This new authorization arrives alongside Q4 revenue growth of 10.2% year on year, slightly better than analyst earnings expectations but paired with cautious full year guidance that several...
